The Big Picture

Two Weeks,
Locked & Loose

Everything in one view. Orange = locked — flights, the VIP club night, the bull run, the moves between cities. Purple = travel days. Teal = fun extras worth considering but not set in stone.

Locked in Travel day Fun maybe

Window: Fri Jul 3 → Thu Jul 16, 2026. Bull runs continue daily in Pamplona through Jul 14 if you want more than the first.

The Trip at a Glance

Peak season,
dialed in

Ibiza first — three nights at full tilt, peaking with a Black Coffee VIP Saturday. Then the hard pivot: mainland to Barcelona, up to Pamplona for the first running of the bulls, and the long haul onward to Tokyo, then Hawaii. This section is the Ibiza leg in detail; the calendar up top maps the whole arc.

3
Ibiza nights · 3 guys
1
VIP table night
28°C
Avg July high
Where to Sleep

Base Camp

Three nights, three guys — grab two rooms (or a suite) in or beside Ibiza Town (Eivissa), walkable to the marina and Dalt Vila, short taxi to the Playa d'en Bossa clubs. All land around $1k/night (≈€920) for a room in peak July. Pick by vibe: design-hotel cool, marina luxe, or historic hilltop hideaway.

Where to Eat

Long Tables,
Slow Sunsets

A mix of the legendary dinner-shows, a clifftop sunset spot, and the institutions locals send you to before a night out. Book everything ahead — July tables vanish.

Where to Party

The Main Event

Three nights, three flavors. Fri is tech-house (Marco Carola's Music On), Sat is your soulful Afro-house peak — Black Coffee at Hï, the one VIP table night (skip the queue, host, seating, a bottle; ~€1,800–3,000 split three ways) — and Sun is melodic (Solomun +1 with Skrillex). Fri and Sun stay GA.

Daytime

Pool & Sun

Ibiza's other half — the daytime party. Two to anchor the weekend: O Beach on Friday afternoon before Music On, and the festival-scale Ushuaïa on Saturday before the Black Coffee night. Pace yourself; these run hard from early afternoon.

Day by Day

The Full Run

Ibiza in detail, then the pivot to the mainland and the bulls. The long-haul to Tokyo and Hawaii is mapped on the calendar up top — book those legs as soon as the club night is locked.
